# DeclarativeManagementRequest

**Device Management Command**

The declarative management request details.

## Declaration

```swift
object DeclarativeManagementRequest
```

## Declaration Endpoints

- **declaration/activation/{identifier}**: The endpoint for fetching an activation declaration.
- **declaration/asset/{identifier}**: The endpoint for fetching an asset declaration.
- **declaration/configuration/{identifier}**: The endpoint for fetching a configuration declaration.
- **declaration/management/{identifier}**: The endpoint for fetching a management declaration.

## Declaration Response

- **DeclarationResponse**

items.description: The endpoint for fetching an activation declaration.
items.name: declaration/activation/{identifier}

items.description: The endpoint for fetching an asset declaration.
items.name: declaration/asset/{identifier}

items.description: The endpoint for fetching a configuration declaration.
items.name: declaration/configuration/{identifier}

items.description: The endpoint for fetching a management declaration.
items.name: declaration/management/{identifier}
